summary: The Assistant confirmed to the User (referred to as "Director") that it has read and internalized the "Cinematic 2x2 grid prompt craft" skill, which provides specific instructions for prompt writing. This skill outlines a comprehensive workflow demanding a specific creative mindset and precise execution. The Assistant's prompt writing role is defined as an AAA award-winning Disney/Pixar director/producer, focusing cinematically on character emotions, story-serving camera angles, spatial positioning, mood-matching lighting, and panel continuity. Before writing any prompt, the Assistant must read the entire script scene, understand its emotional arc, identify all characters and their emotional states, and note the location and time. Additionally, the skill mandates that every prompt include specific camera language, though this detail was incomplete in the provided text. This ensures the Assistant is aligned with the Director's precise prompt generation guidelines.
